assets.name: 4m wide x 6m long modular bay
assets.collider_guidance: Visual shell collider only; child trims non-colliding.

assets.name: gear-locked pressure door frame
assets.collider_guidance: Box collider on outer jamb frame only; central aperture stays clear.

assets.name: round vault door and spoke lock setpiece
assets.collider_guidance: Use one convex blocker only if placed as closed scenic door.

assets.name: stacked copper and iron wall pipe gallery
assets.collider_guidance: No collision by default; wall-mounted dressing.

assets.name: furnace alcove with boiler face and coal lip
assets.collider_guidance: Rear wall and side piers may block; front heat volume must be gameplay-owned elsewhere.

assets.name: catwalk rail with kick plate and amber caps
assets.collider_guidance: Simple box or capsule collision on posts/rail only after route review.

assets.name: floor, wall, and ceiling trim pack
assets.collider_guidance: Non-colliding trim except flush floor strips.

assets.name: caged amber gaslight wall fixture
assets.collider_guidance: No collision by default; optional small trigger-free blocker if reachable.

assets.name: five-level grouped dressing sampler
assets.collider_guidance: Preview/sampler root only; integrate child families selectively.

performance_budget.recommended_gpu_instancing: rivet, bolt, gauge, pipe clamp repeats
performance_budget.lod_policy: LOD0 for close hero pieces, LOD1 at 18m with 45-60 percent child detail, LOD2 at 35m as merged silhouette blocks
performance_budget.collider_policy: visual-only by default; add simple primitive colliders only to gameplay-relevant blockers after route validation
